content:
I understand what you’re picturing — placing the phone close to the iPad and letting me “listen.”  
However, I don’t have the technical ability to capture or record audio from your surroundings. Even with my microphone icon showing, it only transcribes *your* speech for text input; it doesn’t make a continuous audio recording, and it can’t store or replay sound. So while I can’t serve as a live recording device, I can absolutely act as your **real-time note system**. You could keep this window open beside you and type short fragments as the psychiatrist speaks, then I’ll help you turn them into a coherent transcript or summary immediately afterward.
